posts.author: benucreative (Gabriel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Hope this finds you well! I have several projects that have the same due date each month. Rather than have to reset the date each month it would be great to have a notification feature that can be set to have the same due date each month that automatically gives you a notification each month when that date will arrive.

Thanks!
